response.justification: Bogdan Szabo demonstrates strong full-stack and infrastructure experience with relevant exposure to AI-agent infrastructure and Model Context Protocol (MCP) tools. While his background in AI/GenAI is not as extensive as the role requires, his technical leadership, cloud experience, and ability to design scalable systems make him a promising candidate worth interviewing for further assessment.
strengths: Extensive experience with TypeScript, Node.js, and cloud platforms (AWS), aligning with key job technologies.
Proven technical leadership and mentorship, including contributions to open-source projects and developer tooling.
Hands-on experience with AI-agent infrastructure and MCP, indicating familiarity with cutting-edge GenAI workflows.
concerns: Limited explicit experience with vector databases and RAG architectures, which are critical for the role.
Only recent (post-April 2025) direct involvement in AI/GenAI projects, falling short of the 8-year requirement.
No mention of advanced degrees (Master's/PhD) or deep expertise in LLM performance metrics/optimization.
